metadata.description: Marketing plugins by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in) for Cursor 2.5+ — Digital Marketing Pro, ContentForge, SocialForge. Single source repo, all three plugins also install on Claude Code + Cowork + Codex + Antigravity via the Agent Skills open standard.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 153 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow, EU AI Act Article 50 ready.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Open-source enterprise content production pipeline — 19 skills, 13 agents, 29-pattern humanizer, fact-checker, real .docx output with C2PA signing.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — asset-first compositing, AI image + video generation, multi-platform copy adaptation, C2PA signing.
